debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
hPerm : l1.Perm l2
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 ≤ l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 ≤ l2.length
elt : α
⊢ (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt)

failed_attempts: simpa [List.perm_iff_count] using hPerm.insertIdx elt idx1 idx2
simpa [List.Perm] using List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (l' := l2) hPerm idx1 idx2 elt
simpa [List.perm_iff_count] using hPerm.insertIdx idx1 idx2 elt

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := by simpa [List.Perm.length_eq] using hPerm.length_eq
      have hidx2' : idx2 ≤ l1.length := by simpa [hlen] using hidx2
      have hstep : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l1.insertIdx idx2 elt) := by
        simpa using (List.perm_insertIdx_of_le_length (l := l1) (a := elt) hidx1 hidx2')
      exact hstep.trans (hPerm.insertIdx idx2 elt)
simpa using hPerm.insert elt

simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
        (hPerm.append_left [elt]).append_right ((l1.take idx1).Perm (l2.take idx2))

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
          (List.perm_middle (l₁ := l1.take idx1) (l₂ := [elt]) (l₃ := l1.drop idx1))
      have h2 : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      have h3 : (elt :: l2).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
          (List.perm_middle (l₁ := l2.take idx2) (l₂ := [elt]) (l₃ := l2.drop idx2)).symm
      exact h1.trans (h2.trans h3)

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := by
        exact List.Perm.length_eq hPerm
      rcases List.perm_iff_eq_of_subperm (l1 := l1) (l2 := l2) |>.1 ?_ with rfl
      · simpa using List.Perm.refl (l := l1.insertIdx idx1 elt)
      · exact ⟨hPerm.subset, hlen.le⟩
simpa using (hPerm.insertIdx elt idx1 idx2)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop, List.Perm] using
          (List.perm_middle (l := l1.take idx1) (t := l1.drop idx1) (a := elt))
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop, List.Perm] using
          (List.perm_middle (l := l2.take idx2) (t := l2.drop idx2) (a := elt))
      have : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h1.trans (this.trans h2.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
          (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1)
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
          (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2)
      have hcons : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h1.trans (hcons.trans h2.symm)
simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_insertNthLe] using hPerm.insertNthLe idx1 idx2 elt hidx1 hidx2

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
          (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1)
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
          (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2)
      have hcons : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h1.trans (hcons.trans h2.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.Perm] using (List.perm_insertIdx_of_le_length (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1)
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.Perm] using (List.perm_insertIdx_of_le_length (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2)
      have h3 : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h1.trans (h3.trans h2.symm)
simpa [List.Perm] using hPerm.insertIdx elt idx1 idx2

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop, List.perm_cons, List.perm_append_comm] using
          (List.perm_append_right _ (List.perm_append_left _ (List.perm_take_drop idx1 l1)))
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop, List.perm_cons, List.perm_append_comm] using
          (List.perm_append_right _ (List.perm_append_left _ (List.perm_take_drop idx2 l2)))
      exact h1.trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) :=
        (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1)
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) :=
        (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2)
      have hcons : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h1.trans (hcons.trans h2.symm)

have h₁ : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx, hidx1] using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1)
      have h₂ : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.insertIdx, hidx2] using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2)
      have hcons : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        exact List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h₁.trans (hcons.trans h₂.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.perm_cons] using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1).symm
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.perm_cons] using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2).symm
      have hcons : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := by simpa using hPerm.cons elt
      exact h1.trans (hcons.trans h2.symm)

refine (hPerm.insert elt).trans ?_
      exact List.Perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n₁ := idx1) (n₂ := idx2) elt hidx2

simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
        (hPerm.append_right [elt]).trans
          (by
            simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop, List.append_assoc, List.append_left_comm, List.append_comm] using
              (List.perm_middle.trans (List.perm_middle.symm)))
simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_insertNthLe] using hPerm.insertNthLe hidx1 hidx2 elt
simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_insertNthLe] using hPerm.insertNthLe idx1 idx2 elt hidx1 hidx2

simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_insertNthLe _ _ hidx1, List.insertIdx_eq_insertNthLe _ _ hidx2] using
        (hPerm.insertNthLe idx1 idx2 hidx1 hidx2 elt)

rcases hPerm with ⟨f, hf⟩
      have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := by
        simpa [List.perm_iff_eq_of_subperm] using hPerm.length_eq
      have hidx1' : idx1 ≤ l2.length := by simpa [hlen] using hidx1
      have hidx2' : idx2 ≤ l1.length := by simpa [hlen] using hidx2
      have : (l2.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt) := by
        simpa using (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _ (l := l2) (h₁ := hidx1') (h₂ := hidx2')
          (by rfl))
      exact (hPerm.insertIdx_left _ _).trans this

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := by simpa [List.Perm.length_eq] using hPerm.length_eq
      have hPerm' : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx1 elt) := by
        simpa using hPerm.insertIdx idx1 elt
      have hidx2' : idx1 ≤ l2.length := by simpa [hlen] using hidx1
      have hPermIdx : (l2.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt) := by
        exact (List.Perm.insertIdx l2 elt hidx2' hidx2)
      exact hPerm'.trans hPermIdx

simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using
        (hPerm.append_right [elt]).append_left (l1.take idx1)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa using (List.perm_insertIdx hidx1 (l := l1) (a := elt))
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa using (List.perm_insertIdx hidx2 (l := l2) (a := elt))
      have h3 : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        exact List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      exact h1.trans (h3.trans h2.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
      simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt))
    have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
      simpa [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop] using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt))
    exact h1.trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l1 ++ [elt]) := by
        simpa using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l1) (n := idx1) (a := elt) hidx1)
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (l2 ++ [elt]) := by
        simpa using (List.perm_insertIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (a := elt) hidx2)
      have h12 : (l1 ++ [elt]).Perm (l2 ++ [elt]) := by
        exact hPerm.append_right _
      exact h1.trans (h12.trans h2.symm)
simpa [List.perm_iff_count] using hPerm.insertIdx elt idx1 idx2

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        simpa [List.Perm] using (List.perm_insertIdx hidx1 (l := l1) (a := elt))
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        simpa [List.Perm] using (List.perm_insertIdx hidx2 (l := l2) (a := elt))
      exact h1.trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm)
